name: Hard Money Lender New York #1 NYC Manhattan Bridge Capital Inc | Fix Flip Loans, Real Estate Loans, Bridge Loans
description_short: Manhattan Bridge Capital is a NASDAQ-listed hard money lender specializing in fix-and-flip, bridge, and construction loans for real estate investors across the New York tri-state area.
description_long:
Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: LOAN) is a established hard money lending firm operating primarily in the New York metropolitan region. The company focuses exclusively on serving professional real estate investors with short-term, secured lending products backed by real estate collateral. Founded to meet the unique financing needs of fix-and-flip operators and small developers, the firm has built a reputation as a specialized alternative to traditional bank lending for time-sensitive real estate transactions.

The company offers three primary loan products: fix-and-flip loans designed for properties purchased with intent to repair and quickly resell, bridge loans for acquiring small income-producing properties, and loans for new construction projects. All loans are short-term (typically one year), non-traditional bank products secured primarily by real estate collateral and backed by personal guarantees from business principals. Loan structures typically feature interest-only payments during the term with a balloon payment due at maturity. The company finances acquisitions across a wide geographic footprint including all five NYC boroughs, Long Island, Hudson Valley, Rockland, and Westchester Counties, plus select properties in New Jersey, Connecticut, and Florida.

Manhattan Bridge Capital distinguishes itself through its status as a publicly traded hard money lender (NASDAQ listing), which provides transparency and regulatory oversight rarely found in the private lending space. The company self-identifies as the "#1 Hard Money Lender in NYC" and has built specialized expertise in rapid underwriting and approval for time-sensitive real estate deals. Their focus on professional investors rather than consumers and their geographic concentration in the New York area represents a niche but well-defined market positioning.

Prospective borrowers should understand that hard money loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional mortgages, with terms structured around short repayment periods and balloon payments. The website provides limited detail on specific rates, fees, or underwriting criteria, requiring applicants to submit formal applications for quotes. This is a specialized financing product intended for experienced real estate investors with specific exit strategies, not a general-purpose business lending solution.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: NASDAQ-traded company providing transparency and regulatory oversight uncommon in hard money lending
Specializes in rapid approval timelines suited to competitive real estate acquisitions
Accepts properties across wide geographic area: all NYC boroughs, Long Island, Westchester, Hudson Valley, plus NJ/CT/Florida
Established expertise in fix-and-flip lending with structured loan products designed specifically for property investors
Offers multiple loan types (fix-flip, bridge, construction) rather than single-product focus
Publicly identifies as "#1 Hard Money Lender in NYC" with established market reputation
Flexible collateral structure secured by real estate with personal guarantees from principals
cons: Hard money loans carry significantly higher interest rates and fees compared to traditional bank mortgages
Website provides no specific rate, fee, or term information—requires application to receive quotes
Balloon payment structure at end of one-year term requires exit strategy or refinancing plan
Limited transparency on approval criteria, loan amount ranges, or typical costs
Short one-year term may not suit investors without clear exit or refinancing strategy
best_for: Professional real estate investors executing fix-and-flip projects in the NYC tri-state area
Small developers financing new construction projects needing rapid capital deployment
Real estate investors purchasing income properties requiring bridge financing
diagnosis: Manhattan Bridge Capital is designed exclusively for professional real estate investors executing time-sensitive transactions (fix-flips, bridge purchases, construction projects) in the Northeast. The primary caveat is that hard money loans are expensive alternatives to traditional financing, structured around short repayment periods and balloon payments that require clear exit strategies—this is not suitable for owner-occupants or general business financing needs.
services: Fix-and-flip loans for property purchase and repair with quick-sale intent
Bridge loans for small income-producing property acquisitions
New construction project financing for small developers
Hard money loans secured by real estate collateral
Loans with interest-only payment structure during loan term
Financing across NYC boroughs (Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Manhattan, Staten Island)
Long Island lending (Nassau and Suffolk Counties)
Hudson Valley, Rockland, and Westchester County financing
Out-of-state financing (New Jersey, Connecticut, Florida properties)
Loans backed by personal guarantees from business principals
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
